subject: Compact humanoid warrior in dark bodysuit and armor, standing in a fighting stance amid an energy explosion
description: A compact, stocky humanoid figure stands in a side-facing fighting stance wearing a dark bodysuit with light armor plating. Spiky dark hair rises from the head in the characteristic upswept style. The background is a roiling yellow-orange explosion of energy or fire. The figure's fists are at rest at their sides — no weapon is held. The overall frame is tight on the figure with the energy backdrop filling most of the card art.
foreground: stocky armored humanoid in dark bodysuit with upswept spiky hair, fists at sides
